name: AdaptiveIronCondorStrategy
description: Multi-leg adaptive iron condor that adjusts strike geometry, position size, and exit thresholds based on a detected market regime (trending, range-bound, or high-vol-crush). Enters when IV rank exceeds a minimum threshold and exits via profit target, stop-loss, time-based, gamma-risk, or vega-exposure rules. Includes leg-rolling logic for positions under pressure.

ivRankMinEntry.description: Minimum IV rank (0–100) required to enter a new condor position

ivRankHighVol.description: IV rank above which the environment is classified as high-vol-crush regime

ivPercentileLookback.description: Number of trading days used as the IV percentile lookback window

ivHistMean.description: Assumed historical mean of annualised IV for the underlying

ivHistStd.description: Assumed historical standard deviation of annualised IV

deltaTargetShortCall.description: Target delta for the short call leg (0.16 = 16-delta, approx. 1σ OTM)

deltaTargetShortPut.description: Target delta for the short put leg

deltaTargetLongCall.description: Target delta for the long call wing (protection leg)

deltaTargetLongPut.description: Target delta for the long put wing (protection leg)

wingWidthMin.description: Minimum allowable distance between short and long strikes ($)

wingWidthMax.description: Maximum allowable distance between short and long strikes ($)

wingWidthDefault.description: Default wing width used in position-sizing risk calculation ($)

strikeRounding.description: Strike rounding increment; 1.0 = round to nearest dollar

portfolioRiskPct.description: Fraction of portfolio NAV risked per condor trade (2 %)

portfolioNav.description: Notional portfolio size in dollars for position-sizing calculations

maxContracts.description: Hard maximum number of contracts per position

creditMin.description: Minimum net credit per share to justify entry ($)

profitTakePct.description: Close the position when profit reaches this fraction of initial credit (50 %)

stopLossMultiplier.description: Close when unrealised loss reaches this multiple of initial credit received

daysToExpiryMin.description: Exit unconditionally when estimated DTE drops below this value

daysToExpiryTarget.description: Target DTE for new entries; used as position-clock baseline

gammaRiskThreshold.description: Exit if absolute net portfolio gamma exceeds this value

vegaExposureMax.description: Exit if absolute vega-dollar exposure exceeds this value

maxRollCount.description: Maximum number of times a position may be rolled before forcing close

rollTriggerDelta.description: Roll a leg when its breach fraction of the strike range exceeds this

rollCreditMin.description: Minimum net credit required to justify rolling a leg ($)

adxThresholdTrend.description: ADX proxy threshold above which the market is classified as trending

momentumWindow.description: Lookback window (in vol-time units) for the momentum-direction proxy

skewAdjustmentFactor.description: Fraction of the implied vol-skew premium applied as a put-strike adjustment
